etymology.description: зѕЉ(зѕЉ) (yГЎng, "sheep") triplicated = зѕЉ + зѕЉ + зѕЉ = smell of sheep (mutton smell) -> rich smell
etymology.interpretation: The character depicts the smell associated with sheep by triplicating the character зѕЉ(зѕЉ) (yГЎng, "sheep"), emphasizing the intense odor characteristic of mutton.
